purpose: Formal-confidence boundary: UC substrate in AS, SJAS proof apparatus in pinned Proflog.

targets.summary: AS validates Universal Cell transition claims via local predicate-result proof certificates. Willard SJAS consistency, substitution, tableau, and SelfCons machinery are satisfied by autarkenterprises/proflog at the pinned commit—not by reimplemented Python validators.
targets.substrate_bridge: transition evidence bundles over Universal Cell witnesses
targets.next_as_action: Run extended Proflog SJAS suite before major releases; keep UC and SJAS scopes separate in claims.

obstruction_note: claims/fixed_point_obstructions.json documents the abandoned naive Python quotation-term route; Proflog implements the working diagonal path per worked-examples/willard-sjas.md.
